evidence_command: sqlite3 'file:/Users/Server/.healthbot/db/health.db?mode=ro' "SELECT value FROM vault_meta WHERE key='schema_version'; PRAGMA table_info(search_index); SELECT COUNT(*) FROM search_index WHERE text_for_search IS NOT NULL AND text_for_search != '';"
impact: Live vault still stores searchable text in plaintext; violates encrypted-at-rest invariant and exposes PHI risk in local compromise/backups.
fix_recommendation: Apply migration 27 on live DB immediately; run post-migration check requiring search_index.encrypted_text and text_for_search nonempty count == 0 before bot reports secure state.

evidence_command: sqlite3 'file:/Users/Server/.healthbot/db/health.db?mode=ro' "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE filename IS NOT NULL AND filename != '';"
impact: Document filenames remain plaintext in live vault; filenames often contain patient identifiers and test names.
fix_recommendation: Run filename migration immediately and enforce startup fail-closed if plaintext filename count > 0 after unlock.

evidence_command: python: Anonymizer(use_ner=False) + safe_anonymize('Patient John Smith has elevated glucose 180 mg/dL.')
impact: When NER is unavailable, names in medical-context sentences can bypass anonymization and be sent outbound.
exploitability: High in deployments without GLiNER/Ollama or with NER failures.
fix_recommendation: Do not suppress candidate names solely because medical units/terms are nearby; add strict fallback for Title Case names in outbound paths and fail-closed when uncertain.

evidence_command: python: build_research_packet('Patient John Smith has elevated glucose 180 mg/dL what does this mean?', heuristic_name_check=heuristic_name_scan)
impact: Research queries can pass with identifiable names when phrasing includes medical context.
fix_recommendation: Use stronger name detection in research gate (NER+heuristic+identity profile) and hard-block unresolved person-name spans.

impact: PubMed enrichment path crashes; deep substance research quality is degraded and may silently miss evidence.
exploitability: Medium (triggered by normal deep research use).
fix_recommendation: Normalize PubMed result type handling (dataclass vs dict) and add integration test for full _pubmed_search -> _synthesize chain.

evidence_command: python: export_all(mode='plain') after inserting LTM 'Patient John Smith reports fatigue'
impact: "Plain" export marketed as safe can include unlabeled names.
exploitability: High if user shares plain export externally.
fix_recommendation: Use AnonymizePipeline (not firewall-only) for plain export redaction and add adversarial-name tests.

evidence_command: python: CleanDB._assert_no_phi('Patient John Smith has fatigue', 'unit_test')
impact: Clean DB can accept unlabeled names; invalidates zero-PII assumptions for AI/MCP surfaces.
exploitability: High when upstream anonymization misses names.
fix_recommendation: Augment clean gate with NER/heuristic person-name detection, and quarantine records when NER unavailable and uncertainty is non-trivial.

evidence_command: python: VaultAuditor(cfg).run_all() + direct SQL checks on live DB
evidence_output: built_in_audit fail=0 while search_index plaintext rows=267 and documents filename plaintext rows=27
impact: Security audit can report green while critical plaintext residue exists.
fix_recommendation: Add explicit checks for legacy plaintext columns and schema drift in run_all(); fail when residue > 0.

evidence_command: python: ClaudeCLIResearchClient._parse_evolution_result('x', 'Validation failed. not successful. no files modified.')
impact: Failed schema evolution output can be misclassified as success and trigger migration/log side effects.
fix_recommendation: Require structured success signal plus non-empty validated artifacts; do not use substring 'success' heuristic.

evidence_command: python async harness: export_knowledge(password mode) with update.message.delete() raising
impact: Password travels through Telegram message text and processing continues even when deletion fails.
fix_recommendation: Stop accepting passwords in chat commands; switch to secure one-time prompt/token flow or local CLI decrypt path.

evidence_output: 19 failed, 3003 passed, 5 xfailed; failures concentrated in date/temporal parsing + event logger date defaults
impact: Temporal interpretation can be off by one day, degrading recommendation accuracy and timeline integrity.
fix_recommendation: Align date parser timezone basis with test/runtime expectations; add deterministic clock injection for date-sensitive modules.

evidence_command: rg -n 'healthbot_mcp_passphrase|never stored anywhere' src/healthbot/__main__.py README.md CLAUDE.md SECURITY.md
evidence_output: Code stores passphrase in Keychain optionally; docs claim never stored anywhere (with narrower env-var exception text).
impact: Trust model documentation is inconsistent with implementation options.
fix_recommendation: Document Keychain storage option explicitly wherever passphrase-storage guarantees are stated.

evidence_command: python static scan over all tracked files for swallow patterns
impact: High swallow density can hide operational failures and reduce observability.
exploitability: Low direct security impact; medium reliability impact.
fix_recommendation: Replace silent pass paths with structured warning logs + metrics in critical data/security flows.
